questions: How many clubs are there?
Count the number of clubs.
data.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM club

questions: List the name of clubs in ascending alphabetical order.
What are the names of clubs, ordered alphabetically?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club ORDER BY Name ASC

questions: What are the managers and captains of clubs?
Return the managers and captains of all clubs.
data.sql: SELECT Manager ,  Captain FROM club

questions: List the name of clubs whose manufacturer is not "Nike"
What are the names of clubs who do not have the manufacturer Nike?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Manufacturer != "Nike"

questions: What are the names of players in ascending order of wins count?
Return the names of players in order of count of wins, ascending.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Wins_count ASC

questions: What is the name of the player with the highest earnings?
Return the name of the player who earns the most money.
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM player ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

questions: What are the distinct countries of players with earnings higher than 1200000?
From which countries are players who make more than 1200000 from?
data.sql: SELECT DISTINCT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1200000

questions: What is the country of the player with the highest earnings among players that have more than 2 win counts?
Of players who have more than 2 wins, what is the country of the player who makes the most?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Wins_count  >  2 ORDER BY Earnings DESC LIMIT 1

questions: Show names of players and names of clubs they are in.
What are the names of players and the corresponding clubs that they are in?
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name ,  T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID

questions: Show names of clubs that have players with more than 2 win counts.
What are the names of clubs that have players who have won more than twice?
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T2.Wins_count  >  2

questions: Show names of players from the club with manager "Sam Allardyce".
What are the names of players from the club managed by Sam Allardyce?
data.sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID WHERE T1.Manager  =  "Sam Allardyce"

questions: Show names of clubs in descending order of average earnings of players belonging.
What are the names of clubs, ordered descending by the average earnings of players within each?
data.sql: SELECT T1.Name FROM club AS T1 JOIN player AS T2 ON T1.Club_ID  =  T2.Club_ID GROUP BY T1.Club_ID ORDER BY avg(T2.Earnings) DESC

questions: Show different manufacturers and the number of clubs they are associated with.
How many clubs use each manufacturer?
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer ,  COUNT(*) FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer

questions: Please show the most common manufacturer of clubs.
Which manufacturer is most common among clubs?
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

questions: List the manufacturers that are associated with more than one club.
Which manufacturers work for more than 1 club?
data.sql: SELECT Manufacturer FROM club GROUP BY Manufacturer HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

questions: List the country that have more than one player.
Which countries have produced more than one player?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player GROUP BY Country HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1

questions: List the name of clubs that do not have players.
What are the names of clubs that do not have any players?
data.sql: SELECT Name FROM club WHERE Club_ID NOT IN (SELECT Club_ID FROM player)

questions: Show the country of players with earnings more than 1400000 and players with earnings less than 1100000.
Which country has produced both players with earnings over 1400000 and players with earnings below 1100000?
data.sql: SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  >  1400000 INTERSECT SELECT Country FROM player WHERE Earnings  <  1100000

questions: What is the number of distinct countries of all players?
How many different countries are players from?
data.sql: SELECT COUNT (DISTINCT Country) FROM player

questions: Show the earnings of players from country "Australia" or "Zimbabwe".
What are the earnings of players from either of the countries of Australia or Zimbabwe?
data.sql: SELECT Earnings FROM player WHERE Country  =  "Australia" OR Country  =  "Zimbabwe"
